title: God Sword
description: Adds a sword which can one shot any MC mob.
body:
Step into a realm of unmatched power and dominance with the God Sword mod for Minecraft! This legendary weapon transcends all others, granting its wielder the ability to effortlessly eliminate any mob that dares to cross their path. Prepare to command respect and fear as you brandish this divine blade in your adventures.

Explore the features of the God Sword mod:

Omni-Potent: Channel the might of the gods with a sword that can instantly dispatch any mob with a single stroke.

Supreme Authority: Rule over the Minecraft world as the ultimate force to be reckoned with, wielding unparalleled strength.

Embark on a journey of conquest and triumph, as you wield the God Sword to crush enemies and assert your dominance. Are you ready to ascend to godlike status and command the very fabric of your Minecraft universe? Download the God Sword mod now and unleash its unparalleled power upon your foes!

REQUIRES: Passionfruit API
